# Jefe

> Jefe is an AI manager for Shopify stores. It learns how a store actually operates, then recommends the next move — with the evidence behind it — and can action it directly once a merchant trusts it to.

## What Jefe does

Jefe connects to a Shopify store and builds a structured, evolving understanding of how the business runs: its products, orders, customers, goals and constraints. It uses that understanding to make recommendations that are specific to the merchant rather than generic ecommerce advice, and — within limits the merchant sets per action — can carry out the recommended action itself.

## Status

Jefe is pre-launch and running a Design Partner Program for its first 100 e-commerce managers, who help teach Jefe their store in exchange for early access.

## Links

- Website: https://mynamejefe.com/
- Join the Design Partner Program: https://mynamejefe.com/#signup
